title: Power Armor: Renostalgized
description: Power Armor: Renostalgized is a mod bringing a fresh and modern approach to one of minecraft's oldest ideas: Power Armors!
body:
Description

This mod is inspired by the classic Power Armor mods like Modular Powersuits, IC2 and many more...   The mod has a quite intuitive modular armor system with different armor modules that can be used to improve and customize your armor. Applying and removing these modules can be done using the Armor Modification Table. ![Armor Modification Table](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1368563/description_b2fc5542-16d8-413e-b0d5-d45e62dd7044.png)   After your modules, the armor is ready to be used, providing you with jetpack flight, speed boost, night vision, armor and a whole lot more!   ![Armor Texture & Model](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1368563/description_a7327052-dbe2-4491-84df-bdf62d3b91dd.png)   The mod requires lots of plates and wires. The first one of which is made in the compressor machine: ![Compressor machine](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1368563/description_553b5dee-42bb-48dd-aa2b-7d2bc1c98d26.png)
